flavorText: The earth trembles as the great worm surfaces...
deathLine: The great worm coils once more, and goes still. The earth stops trembling.

flavorText: All roads lead to his house in the end.
deathLine: Donn's crown rolls into the dark. For once, a road leads away from his house.

flavorText: Hoofbeats with no rider to guide them. Cold seeps in.
deathLine: The hoofbeats fade. Whatever the Dullahan came to call, it will have to call another night.

flavorText: No grave has ever managed to hold him.
deathLine: Abhartach crumbles to old dust. This grave, at least, might finally hold.

flavorText: Mother of monsters — thousands of eyes open.
deathLine: The thousand eyes close, one by one, until only the dark is watching.
